arts.ttl: Man United 'determined to sign' Amsterdam-born wonderkid branded 'the next Jude Bellingham'
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly determined to win the race for Ajax teenager Abdellah Ouazane, who is currently starring for Morocco Under-17s.

arts.ttl: Alaves vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Alaves in what’s going to be a crucial game in the race for the 2024-25 La Liga title. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Tchouameni, Asencio, Fran Garcia, Valverde, Camavinga, Bellingham, Brahim, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes responds to Real Madrid summer transfer bid
arts.sum: That is according to Football Insider, who report that Bruno has made it clear to Madrid that he will not be quitting Man Utd at the end of the season. Bruno Fernandes has rejected a summer move to Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury, suspension list and return dates for Real Madrid: Ben White, Thomas Partey, Jorginho latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Arsenal's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League quarter-final second leg with Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Alaves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on relegation-threatened Alaves in La Liga on Sunday afternoon. Carlo Ancelotti’s side are reeling from a humbling Champions League defeat at Arsenal, with Los Blancos beaten 3-0 at the Emirates. Though there’s little room for error in the La Liga title race, the Spanish champions are likely to rotate ahead of the […] The post Real Madrid XI vs Alaves – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Alaves: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid are in desperate need of a victory against Alavés after suffering two consecutive defeats.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star will look to prove Florentino Perez right in Real Madrid second leg
arts.sum: Arsenal head to the Santiago Bernabeu with a three-goal lead to defend against the European champions, Real Madrid, on the back of a 1-1 draw with Brentford which made clear where their focus lies

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta gives update on triple injury blow ahead of crucial Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta gave updates on Jorginho, Thomas Partey and Ben White after Arsenal were held to a frustrating 1-1 draw by Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday

arts.ttl: Alaves vs Real Madrid: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Alaves in La Liga on Sunday. Preview includes team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Arsenal paid compliment as Real Madrid star fires comeback warning - 'If anyone can'
arts.sum: Arsenal, currently leading 3-0 from the first leg, travel to Real Madrid next week as they bid to reach the Champions League semi-finals following Tuesday night's heroics at the Emirates
